args: export WAYLAND_DISPLAY=${WAYLAND_DISPLAY:-wayland-1}; export HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE=${HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE:-$(ls /run/user/$(id -u)/hypr/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)}; export DOTFILES_DIR="$HOME/hairglasses-studio/dotfiles"; cd "$HOME/hairglasses-studio/dotfiles/mcp/dotfiles-mcp" && exec go run .
